auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Recharge API token used with the X-Recharge-Access-Token header. Create it in the Recharge merchant portal under Tools & apps > API tokens: https://docs.getrecharge.com/docs/recharge-api-key.

actions.name: get_charge
actions.description: Retrieve one Recharge charge by ID.

include.description: Related Recharge resources to include, joined as a comma-separated include query parameter.

inputSchema.description: Path and include parameters for retrieving one Recharge resource.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Recharge charge.

actions.name: get_customer
actions.description: Retrieve one Recharge customer by ID.

include.description: Related Recharge resources to include, joined as a comma-separated include query parameter.

inputSchema.description: Path and include parameters for retrieving one Recharge resource.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving a Recharge customer.

actions.name: list_charges
actions.description: List Recharge charges with cursor pagination and common filters.

limit.description: The number of records to request. Recharge allows up to 250.

cursor.description: The Recharge cursor returned as next_cursor or previous_cursor.

include.description: Related Recharge resources to include, joined as a comma-separated include query parameter.

ids.description: Recharge resource IDs to request as a comma-separated ids query parameter.

sortBy.description: The Recharge sort_by expression, such as id-desc.

createdAtMin.description: A Recharge date or datetime filter value.

createdAtMax.description: A Recharge date or datetime filter value.

updatedAtMin.description: A Recharge date or datetime filter value.

updatedAtMax.description: A Recharge date or datetime filter value.

discountCode.description: Discount code to filter charges by.

externalOrderId.description: External ecommerce order ID to filter charges by.

scheduledAt.description: A Recharge date or datetime filter value.

scheduledAtMin.description: A Recharge date or datetime filter value.

scheduledAtMax.description: A Recharge date or datetime filter value.

processedAtMin.description: A Recharge date or datetime filter value.

processedAtMax.description: A Recharge date or datetime filter value.

status.description: The Recharge status filter value or comma-separated status list.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Recharge charges.

items.description: A Recharge resource object returned by the API.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page, when Recharge returns one.
The cursor for the previous page, when Recharge returns one.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Recharge charges.
